hero.title: Đoàn Emmanuel
hero.subtitle: Vietnamese Eucharistic Youth Movement in the USA
hero.caption: Liên Đoàn Biển Đức · St. Benedict League of Chapters

about.headline: About Our Đoàn
about.description: We are a faith community rooted in the Vietnamese Catholic tradition, nurturing young people through faith, service, and fellowship.

cards.title: Our Mission
cards.description: To form young Vietnamese Catholics in faith, love, and service through the Eucharistic spirituality of VEYM.

cards.title: Our Team
cards.description: Meet the dedicated Huynh Trưởng leaders who guide and inspire our youth each week with passion and commitment.

cards.title: Our History
cards.description: Forty years of faith, community, and service — from our founding to today’s thriving Đoàn family.

divisionsIntro.headline: Ngành · Youth Divisions
divisionsIntro.description: Five age-based divisions, each with its own color, motto, and mission — together forming one community in Christ.

eventsIntro.headline: Upcoming Events
eventsIntro.description: Stay connected with all Đoàn activities and celebrations.

join.headline: Join Our Đoàn
join.description: Become part of our Vietnamese Catholic youth family.
